question: How many WAGO Distribution Blocks are included in the assembly?

text_chunks: TMC 71C 06A 1019977 240VAC IEC60947-2 AI ON VO OF NETGEAR TMC 71C 13A 1019982 240VAC IEC60947-2 A I ON TMC 71C 02A 1019973 240VAC IEC60947-2 A I ON UR 10%A TO OFF BATT lou=10kA To OFF Poor ПП Load the WAGO DIN rail carriers which will function as distribution blocks. Install two (2) 5position WAGOs (PN 221-415) into one carrier (PN 221-501) and a single (1) 5-position WAGO into the second carrier. The WAGOs should audibly snap into the DIN carrier. Snap the WAGO distribution blocks onto the left side of the DIN rail. Mark the block with two WAGOs as '+' and the other as '-' using a permanent marker. Install QTY eight (8) 2' x 4-40 hex standoffs for web relay and modem mezzanine plate. LOAD CUR 10kA

question: Where is the POE Injector located in the electronics enclosure diagram?
ground_truth: The POE Injector is located beneath the modem in the electronics enclosure.

text_chunks: Smartfolar charge controller MPPT 75 1 10 0 4 CB IP43 C CE A O W8-000 G66 La DA LOAD Split PoE Injector wire and connect to web relay Relay 1. The C terminal goes to the distribution block. The NO terminal goes to the PoE injector. Complete the power wiring for the modem cable. The white , red, and green wires go to the positive distribution block. The black wire goes to the negative distribution block.

Wrap the strap around the aluminum plate and place the aluminum plate into the enclosure. Attach with included mounting screws. Secure mounting strap by buckling it around the plate. PYIN RELAY. 1 Connect antenna to CELLULAR SMA jack on modem and tighten with a pliers or wrench. Apply a zip tie and label with 'PV IN' around the PV+/- pigtail wires. Attach 10FT outdoor ethernet cable to DATA OUT of PoE injector and coil inside enclosure. Retain with zip tie for shipping.

MPPT 75 1 10 0 4 0 1P43 01 CE AI - 65109 NETGEAR ProSafe 5. Port Gigabit Switch Temte Melod LOAD Complete power wiring for Netgear switch with one of the barrel jack connectors. Connect the barrel jack into the netgear switch and the other end to the distribution block (the wire you marked with red goes into the + distribution block and the other goes in the - distribution block). Complete power wiring for PoE Injector . Leave extra slack in the PoE injector positive wire as it will be split for the web relay later.
